name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M83566 PM83566 Monogram. This Nano Diane features a Monogram canvas body with leather corners and a traditional buckle, recreating vintage details like the rounded flap and belt-style closure. Spacious enough for a phone and daily essentials, with a detachable handle and adjustable/removable shoulder strap for versatile carrying, suitable for day or night. Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm
